discovery_sources.title: BrightPath customer discovery notes
discovery_sources.description: Operator notes from five customer-development interviews.

discovery_sources.title: BrightPath GTM review
discovery_sources.description: Internal note from GTM review with partner outreach feedback.
discovery_sources.provenance_note: Operator captured GTM and channel feedback.

evidence_targets.evidence_statement: Clinic operators describe the care-navigation workflow as urgent and recurring.
evidence_targets.excerpt: Operators say discharge coordination remains manual and time consuming.
evidence_targets.assumption_title: The problem may be broadly painful across similar clinics
evidence_targets.assumption_statement: The team may be addressing a recurring operational pain point, not a niche edge case.

evidence_targets.evidence_statement: Partner outreach is active, but no repeatable conversion path exists yet.
evidence_targets.excerpt: The team has conversations underway, but channel conversion is still inconsistent.
evidence_targets.assumption_statement: The GTM motion is still too founder-led to become repeatable.

domain_scores.rationale: The market signal is promising, but it still needs reviewed support across a broader sample.
domain_scores.key_gap: Need reviewed demand evidence across more than one clinic segment.
domain_scores.next_action: Review interview notes and cluster repeat demand patterns.

domain_scores.rationale: The GTM motion is visible, but it is still inconsistent and highly founder dependent.
domain_scores.key_gap: Need evidence of a repeatable partner conversion path.
domain_scores.next_action: Capture structured partner outreach outcomes and conversion blockers.

capital_readiness_drafts.readiness_rationale: The problem narrative is interesting, but the company still needs reviewed market and GTM evidence.
blocking_gaps: Reviewed market evidence is still missing
Repeatable GTM proof is still missing
required_evidence: Reviewed demand signal from multiple clinics
capital_readiness_drafts.support_routing_recommendation: Route customer discovery synthesis and GTM design support next.
capital_readiness_drafts.next_milestone: Validate one repeatable clinic segment and document the partner conversion path.

support_routing_drafts.route_recommendation: Route customer discovery synthesis and GTM design support next.
support_routing_drafts.route_rationale: The team needs a clearer demand narrative and a more repeatable conversion motion before capital discussions.

milestone_drafts.milestone_statement: Validate one repeatable clinic segment and document the partner conversion path.
milestone_drafts.milestone_rationale: The team needs one grounded segment plus a clearer GTM path before a stronger capital conversation.

strengths: Customer conversations suggest a real operational pain point.
top_gaps: Need reviewed demand evidence across more clinics.
Need a more repeatable GTM motion.
evidence_improving: Customer interviews are starting to cluster around one operational workflow.
recommended_next_actions: Review and synthesize clinic interview evidence.
Document channel conversion blockers and next experiments.
founder_report.capital_readiness_summary: Capital readiness remains a draft view only. The team still needs reviewed market and GTM evidence before a stronger capital-path conversation.

current_strengths: Customer need is becoming more legible.
stuck_reasons: The GTM path is still too founder dependent.
internal_report.recommended_support_route: Customer discovery synthesis and GTM design support.
internal_notes: Do not push capital introductions until reviewed market evidence is stronger.
